events.title: KIRTAN with DIANA
events.description:
KIRTAN with DIANA💫

Kirtan is more than music — it is a devotional practice, a meditation, and a journey back to the heart.

In this gathering, Diana weaves together mantra, harmonium, guitar, mridanga and karatals rhythms to create an immersive experience of sound, presence, and connection. Through call-and-response chanting, we enter a shared space where the mind softens, the heart opens, and the voice becomes a bridge between ourselves and something greater.

Each kirtan unfolds as a journey: beginning gently with softness, prayer, and heart-centered reflection, then gradually building into powerful waves of rhythm, joy, movement, and celebration. Together, we invoke the qualities we long to embody — compassion, courage, devotion, love, freedom, and bliss — remembering that these energies already exist within us.

Diana’s approach to kirtan is deeply rooted in devotion, yoga, and authentic expression. Her offerings are known for their warmth, sincerity, playful spirit, and ability to create genuine connection within the room. Whether you choose to sing loudly, sit quietly, meditate, dance, or simply receive the vibrations, you are welcome exactly as you are.

No experience with mantra or singing is needed. Kirtan is not about performance — it is about presence, feeling, and community.

Come to reconnect with your voice, your heart, and the joy of singing together.

✨ All voices welcome

✨ Beginner-friendly

✨ A space for reflection, healing, and celebration

⭐️Mark Your Calendars!⭐️

🗓️THURSDAY, JULY 16, 2026 | 7 PM 

📍Zest Garden Temple

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

💰PRICE💰

Early Bird: 200K | Presale: 250K | At The Door: 300K

🎟️ Grab Your Tickets Now at Dragon Tea Temple or Megatix!

events.title: The 12 Meridians — Where Ancient Rivers Flow
events.description:
The 12 Meridians — Where Ancient Rivers Flow

Three thousand years ago, Chinese healers discovered something the modern world is only beginning to remember:

The body is not a machine. It is a landscape.

Rivers of energy — known as meridians — flow through mountains of muscle, valleys of breath, and oceans of emotion. When these rivers move freely, we feel vibrant, clear, and alive. When they become blocked, the body begins to communicate through tension, fatigue, discomfort, and imbalance.

This weekly gathering is an invitation to reconnect with your body's natural intelligence through the ancient map of the 12 meridians.

Together, we'll explore how energy moves through the body, how emotions and physical symptoms are connected, and how simple practices can support greater flow, balance, and vitality.

This is not just something to learn. It is something to feel.

A space for curiosity, self-discovery, and a deeper relationship with your own body.

What You'll Explore

 Understanding the 12 Meridians and their role in wellbeing
 The connection between emotions, organs, and energy flow
 Simple self-healing practices inspired by Traditional Chinese Medicine
 Body awareness and somatic exploration
 Practical wisdom you can bring into everyday life

Each session offers a new doorway into understanding yourself through the lens of this ancient healing tradition.

Meet Miao Miao

Born in China and rooted in its oldest wisdom traditions, Miao Miao is a TEDx speaker, author of two books, and the founder of One Minute Eye Reading.

Her work is the result of more than a decade of research and over 6,000 live eye-gazing sessions. Drawing from eye reading, moxibustion (艾灸), somatic healing, and Traditional Chinese Medicine, she bridges ancient knowledge with modern life in a way that feels practical, personal, and deeply relevant.

Having called Bali home for many years, she now shares the healing wisdom her culture has carried for millennia.

events.title: Full Moon & Lion's Gate Celebration with Jeremy Sol
events.description: Jeremy Sol returns to AYMC for his late-summer full moon offering — an evening of Maha Kirtan with Sacred Mantras, Nataraja Ecstatic Dance, Sound Healing, collective mantra, and a closing Fire Ritual under the Lion's Gate full moon. August 8 is one of the most charged dates on the ceremonial calendar: the full moon and the Lion's Gate portal converge, amplifying the Bhakti devotional current Jeremy Sol carries. Expect the full Bhakti Bliss Bali format — live instruments, devotional chanting that escalates into ecstatic movement, a grounding sound journey, and a fire circle to close. At AYMC's open-air shala in Penestanan, Sayan.
events.short_description: Jeremy Sol's Full Moon & Lion's Gate evening at AYMC — Maha Kirtan, Nataraja Ecstatic Dance, Sound Healing, and Fire Ritual on the year's most electrically charged ceremonial date.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan Kelod No. 75, Sayan, Ubud
events.price_info: IDR 300,000 early bird / IDR 350,000 presale / IDR 400,000 door (estimate — confirm at AYMC)

events.title: Crystal & Metal Bowl Fusion
events.description:
Crystal/ metal Tibetan bowls and tubular chimes gently blend with therapeutic world instruments such as Didgeridoo, Zen Flute, Sufi Ney Flute, Kachapi strings, voice (medicine chants in ancient languages), koshi chimes and unplugged guitar to create a spacious rich tapestry of acoustic sounds, and soothing overtones for personal connection, deep relaxation and inner peace.

NOTES:

 If you have any issues with online payments, please email bookings@theyogabarn.com or WhatsApp The Yoga Barn Hotline (+62) 811 3983 789  We're here to help!
 Registration and payment can also be made at The Yoga Barn Reception
 If you see ticket sales are closed for the Event, contact us by WhatsApp to see if there is still space available!
 For special class, workshop and night event, Children under the age of 10 are not permitted to join , there are NO EXCEPTIONS to this rule. Children ages 10-15 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian or sibling that is over 18

 

Refund Policy:

If you are unable to attend this event, you are eligible for a full refund of the ticket price if you contact us at least 24 hours in advance of the published start time. Contact must be made via email to bookings@theyogabarn.com  or in person at The Yoga Barn reception desk. We are NOT able to process refunds for any reason if you contact us less than 24 hours prior to the published start time.  We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price.

Ticket Transfer:

Tickets are not transferrable to another person. The booking is only valid for the person whose name is printed on this ticket.

Late Arrival:

We recommend that you arrive 15 minutes prior to the start time. If you arrive after the published start time, you may be denied access and your booking will not be refunded.

Cancellation Policy:

If this event is canceled by The Yoga Barn prior to the start time, you are eligible for a refund of your ticket. We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price. Please be aware that refunds may take up to 30 days.
